title: Mason Cash Cane Preparation Bowls Set | 10cm Stoneware Bowls | 175ml Capacity | Dishwasher Safe | Ideal for Prep, Pinch Pots, Dips & Desserts
features: VERSATILE PREP BOWLS | The Mason Cash Preparation Bowls are perfect for storing measured ingredients while cooking. With a 175ml capacity and 10cm diameter. They’re ideal as pinch pots, dip dishes, or dessert bowls.
DURABLE & PRACTICAL | Made from stoneware with a smooth glazed finish. Lightweight yet sturdy safe for use in the dishwasher.
ELEGANT COLOUR PALETTE | Designed in beautiful cane and cream tones to coordinate with the iconic Mason Cash Cane collection and complement any kitchen style.

CANE COLLECTION | The Mason Cash Original Cane range includes mixing bowls in various sizes and colours, as well as matching pudding basins and essential prep accessories to suit all kitchens and baking tasks.
MASON CASH HERITAGE | Established in 1800, Mason Cash has been crafting timeless, functional kitchenware for over two centuries. Loved by generations of bakers for its quality and design.
